name: Skyworks Solutions, Inc.
description: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. is an American semiconductor company that specializes in the design, development, and manufacturing of proprietary semiconductor products. Headquartered in Irvine, California, the company provides high-performance analog and mixed-signal semiconductors that are essential for mobile communications, automotive, industrial, and infrastructure applications. Skyworks' innovative solutions enable the connectivity required for the Internet of Things (IoT), 5G, and other advanced wireless technologies. As a constituent of the S&P 500 and listed on the Nasdaq, the company plays a critical role in the global electronics supply chain by delivering highly integrated and complex system-on-chip solutions.
